title: Senior Doctor - RML Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - RML Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at RML Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Doctor to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About RML Hospital:
RML Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital!
